-- Check Phase 3 module timestamps for Agile Methods Level 1
SELECT c.competency_name, tm.target_level, tm.created_at
FROM phase3_training_module tm
JOIN competency c ON tm.competency_id = c.id
WHERE tm.organization_id = 48 AND c.competency_name = ''Agile Methods'' AND tm.target_level = 1
LIMIT 3;
")
